exam_format: Multiple Choice (VCP/VCAP Design); Hands-on Lab (VCAP Deploy); Panel Defense (VCDX)

testing_centers.notes: VCP and VCAP written/design exams via Pearson VUE test centers or OnVUE online proctoring

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. ID must match the name on the exam registration. Acceptable forms include passport, driver's license, or national ID card.
exam_rules: Closed-book exam for VCP and VCAP written/design exams. No notes, study materials, or electronic devices permitted. Personal items must be stored. No food or drink. VCAP Deploy lab exams are hands-on in a live vSphere environment — no closed-book restriction applies to the lab interface. VCDX panel defense requires submitting a design documentation package in advance.
renewal_options: All VMware certifications are valid for 2 years. Renewal requires passing the current version of the exam or a higher-level exam in the same track before expiry. No CE credit option — exam retake is the only renewal path.

retake_policy.notes: 15-day waiting period between retake attempts for VCP and VCAP written/design exams. VCAP lab and VCDX panel defense retake scheduling is coordinated with VMware/Broadcom directly.
